title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: THE POWDER RIVER SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space. No lifeguard on duty. 1723 Madison Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 5:30am-10pm (541) 523-6541 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-6541 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
